entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The continent where sustainable food production and national agricultural research systems face significant challenges

entities.name: NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems responsible for agricultural research within a nation, tasked with generating farmer-oriented technologies

entities.name: EXPORT CROPS
entities.description: Crops produced for international markets that previously received significant research input

entities.name: RESEARCH
entities.description: Scientific investigation and development aimed at improving agricultural productivity

entities.name: NATIONAL GOVERNMENTS
entities.description: State authorities responsible for supporting research and agricultural systems

entities.name: HUMAN RESOURCE DEVELOPING
entities.description: The process of improving the skills and capabilities of personnel within the agricultural sector

entities.name: DONOR FUNDING
entities.description: Financial support provided by external donors for agricultural research and development

entities.name: FOOD CRISIS
entities.description: A situation of food insecurity that has taken on political dimensions in Africa

entities.name: WESTERN TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Technology developed in Western nations, previously assumed to be a universal solution for African agricultural problems

entities.name: FARMER-ORIENTED LOCATION-SPECIFIC TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Agricultural technologies tailored to the specific needs of farmers and their local environments

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing food and fiber through farming activities

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country from which examples are drawn to inform the agenda for action for NARS

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH CENTRES
entities.description: Global organizations that collaborate with governments and donors to resolve agricultural research problems
